col_2: Control welding + engine-access service + correct tub reattachment + ordered Ironman Foamcell suspension kit.

col_5: Photo and tag every mount point and spacer before separation.
col_6: Tagging consumables, marker labels, template sheet
col_7: No tub lift until tag-map is complete.
col_8: Mount map and reference photos signed off.

col_3: Tub lift and mount-point condition survey
col_5: Record hole ovality, captive-nut condition, and corrosion depth at each point.
col_6: Inspection tools, rust-penetrant, borescope as needed
col_7: No welding closure without per-point repair decision.

col_3: Welding and closure of mount interfaces
col_5: Confirm mount faces, hole centerlines, and plate thickness restoration.
col_7: No refit planning until weld closure and anti-corrosion prep are complete.
col_8: All mount points dimension-checked and protected.

col_3: Tub-off engine-bay access inspection and service list lock
col_5: Inspect mounts, lines, hoses, clamps, shift linkage/top service items.
col_7: Buy only confirmed-failed items for condition-based components.
col_8: Inspection report with buy/no-buy per line item.

col_3: Suspension install path: ordered Ironman Foamcell kit
col_5: Validate spring arch, shackle angle, pinion/caster behavior after trial load.
col_6: Ironman main kit shipment; separate front damper shipment (24635FE x2)
col_7: Do not final-torque suspension until both shipments are received, contents-checked, and ride-height/alignment checks pass.

col_3: Tub reattachment interface prep and trial fit
col_5: Dry trial fit with shim pack and rubber mounts before final bolt-up.
col_6: Body mount rubber kit, hardware kit, shim/spacer pack
col_7: No permanent tub fastening before successful trial seating.
col_8: All attachment points align without forced fit.

col_3: Final tub reattachment and torque map execution
col_5: Follow cross-pattern torque sequence and recheck after settling.
col_7: Gate to integration close only after torque recheck and gap alignment.
col_8: Tub fixed at all correct points with verified torque log.

col_5: Road/yard check for shift engagement, vibration, mount settling, and steering feel.
col_7: Escalate only if disengagement or mount-settle issues remain.
col_8: Vehicle moves to reassembly validation lane.
